name: Brenda's Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Sift to combine.
2. In a large bowl, cream the shortening and vanilla extract until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sugars to the butter mixture, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Mix in the flour mixture until just combined.
6. Stir in the rolled oats, then fold in the chocolate chips and chopped walnuts (if using).
7. Drop rounded spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes.
9. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
